_readme: This pl runs one v1 Cypress payment spec that hits POST /payments and confirm — same family as get_connector_with_networks.json reachability (not guaranteed to hit debit-routing + network branch).
Prereqs: router running with Cypress env (BASEURL, API keys, connector). In cypress-tests: npm ci.

For LLVM line diff: build/run router with -Cinstrument-coverage, LLVM_PROFILE_FILE, run this pl with --allow-exec, stop router, then just coverage_html, then coverage_feedback_loop without --allow-exec to only diff.
